Message types: by opting in you may receive appointment confirmations, scheduling and service updates, account notifications, quotes, and (with marketing consent) promotional offers from Mikahs Auto Detailing and Services LLC. Consent to receive text messages is not a condition of any purchase. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency may vary. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help.
